channel.title: Dragonholic Translations — Free Chapters
channel.description: Your favorite place to read Web Novels & Light Novels. Join our community and connect with us by joining our Discord server.

item.title: After Transmigrating, I and the Female Lead Both Found It 'Really Fragrant' (GL) — Chapter 75
item.description: Southern Border, Foot of Yegang Mountain. This desolate place, originally sparsely wooded and uninhabited, was suddenly broken from its long silence by the sound of war drums. Smoke filled the air, flags fluttered, and blood flowed like rivers across the ground, staining the earth dark brown. Even the cold wind carried a hint of foul-smelling…
